title: Pillen Promotes Nebraska Ethanol, Concludes Successful Trade Mission to Japan
content: Jim Pillen wrapped up a highly productive trade mission to Japan. The mission included meetings with key importers of Nebraska beef and pork; opportunities to promote Nebraska-made biofuels; and high-level discussions to strengthen the stateâ€™s longstanding commercial, cultural, and educational ties to Japan.Gov. Pillen highlighted Nebraskaâ€™s advantages as a biofuels supplier during remarks to a gathering of ethanol buyers in Tokyo. The event was organized by the U.S. Embassy in Japan and the U.S. Grains Council. Now is an especially strategic time to promote Nebraska ethanol to Japan
author: Analysts Account
